description: Tuned run: aligned algo_seed with author (3), reduced lr_a 3x (0.0001), extended critic warmup (500), added entropy regularization (entloss_coef=0.01). Hypothesis: lower lr + entropy soft constraint + longer critic warmup + author seed will give actor-critic a better chance to converge.
